form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 400m at this track (22.93), beating Hooked On Hope. In top form and can make it three straight.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened rounding the home turn and fell.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on April 11 over 400m at this track behind Ice On Fire beaten 10 lengths (24.00) in a Grade 5. Unbeaten in three starts from this draw. Key runner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began on terms; Came together and was checked as a consequence.

form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last two starts, the latest when third (23.12) over 400m at this track. Has a low draw. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked leaving the back straight.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last seven starts. Last time out finished 2nd over 400m at Maitland beaten 1.75 lengths (22.47) behind Federal Senor in a Grade 5 on April 13. Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 4 length second over 400m this track in 23.12. Rates among the chances this time.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.88) when seventh over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. Will need the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on and lost considerable ground entering the first turn.
Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.
Checked exiting the turn into the home straight and was momentarily unbalanced.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (22.86) over 400m at Maitland. Wide draw here. Prefer others.
